_meta.description: Curated NCCN-style guideline corpus for the OncoGuideline Engine demo. Each entry mirrors the structure of an NCCN Compendium recommendation. Production deployments must replace this with the licensed NCCN feed.
_meta.license_note: DEMO ONLY. NCCN guidelines are copyrighted; production use requires an NCCN Compendium subscription (~$25K/yr).
_meta.source_emulated: NCCN Clinical Practice Guidelines in Oncology

guidelines.guideline: NCCN NSCL Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer v.5.2025
guidelines.section_heading: Adenocarcinoma · EGFR Sensitizing Mutations · Stage IV
guidelines.excerpt: For patients with stage IV NSCLC harboring sensitizing EGFR mutations (exon 19 deletion or L858R substitution), osimertinib 80 mg orally once daily is the preferred first-line therapy regardless of PD-L1 expression. Category 1 evidence per FLAURA trial (NCT02296125, NEJM 2018, 378:113-125).

For patients with stage II-III HER2+ breast cancer, neoadjuvant TCHP for 6 cycles (docetaxel 75 mg/m² + carboplatin AUC 6 + trastuzumab 8 mg/kg loading then 6 mg/kg + pertuzumab 840 mg loading then 420 mg, all q3w) is preferred. Category 1 per TRYPHAENA, NeoSphere.

guidelines.section_heading: HER2-Negative Metastatic Disease · BRCA-Mutated · PARP Inhibition
guidelines.excerpt: Olaparib 300 mg PO BID is recommended for patients with germline BRCA1/BRCA2 mutations and HER2-negative metastatic breast cancer who have received prior chemotherapy. Category 1 per OlympiAD trial.
First-line palbociclib 125 mg PO daily x21d/28d cycle + letrozole 2.5 mg PO daily for postmenopausal HR+/HER2- mBC. Category 1 per PALOMA-2 (HR 0.58, mPFS 24.8 mo vs 14.5 mo).

Pembrolizumab 200 mg q3w (or 400 mg q6w) is recommended for unresectable/metastatic MSI-H or dMMR solid tumors that have progressed following prior treatment and have no satisfactory alternative options. Tissue-agnostic FDA approval based on KEYNOTE-158, KEYNOTE-164.
Pembrolizumab is approved for unresectable/metastatic TMB-H (≥10 mutations/Mb) solid tumors. Per KEYNOTE-158 cohort, ORR 29% in TMB-H vs 6% in non-TMB-H.

guidelines.section_heading: Metastatic · RAS/RAF Wild-Type Left-Sided · Anti-EGFR + Chemo
guidelines.excerpt: First-line FOLFIRINOX (oxaliplatin 85 mg/m² + irinotecan 180 mg/m² + leucovorin 400 mg/m² + 5-FU 400 mg/m² bolus then 2400 mg/m² CIVI 46h, q14d) + anti-EGFR for left-sided RAS/RAF WT mCRC.

guidelines.section_heading: Maintenance · BRCA-mutated or HRD+ · PARP Inhibition
guidelines.excerpt: Olaparib 300 mg PO BID for 2 years as maintenance after response to first-line platinum-based chemo in BRCA1/2-mutated stage III/IV ovarian cancer. Per SOLO1 (HR 0.30, 7-yr OS 67% vs 47%).
